plot outline: A young coming-of-age tale about a teenage boy, Simon Spier, goes through a different kind of Romeo and Juliet story. Simon has a love connection with a boy, Blue, by email, but the only problem is that Simon has no idea who he's talking to. Simon must discover who that boy is--who Blue is. Along the way, he tries to find himself as well.
title: Love, Simon
akas: Simon vs. the Homo Sapiens Agenda (United States)

other companies.name: Production Services of GA aka: Event Services of GA
